commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: Alleluia: The Church extols the Lord for His judgements with unceasing love. For Alleluia signifies, "Praise ye the Lord." Lastly, the Psalms which have for the beginning, "Praise ye the Lord," begin in the Hebrew with Alleluia.

commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: rises up: "Rises up," he says, not "will rise up." But Babylon always goes into perdition, and is in part already burning, while Jerusalem passes into paradise, as the Lord manifests in the poor man and the rich. <a

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
